book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. JOHN

verses.text: These words spake Jesus, and lifted up his eyes to heaven, and said, \+w Father\+w*, \+w the hour\+w* \+w is come\+w*; \+w glorify\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w Son\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w Son\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w may glorify\+w* \+w thee\+w*:

\+w As\+w* \+w thou hast given\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w power over\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w flesh\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w he should give\+w* \+w eternal\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w to as\+w* \+w many as\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w hast given\+w* \+w him\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w eternal\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they might know\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w the only\+w* \+w true\+w* \+w God\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w Jesus\+w* \+w Christ\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w thou hast sent\+w*.
\+w I\+w* \+w have glorified\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the earth\+w*: \+w I have finished\+w* \+w the work\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w thou gavest\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w do\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w now\+w*, \+w O Father\+w*, \+w glorify\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w thine own self\+w* \+w with the glory\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w I had\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w was\+w*.

\+w I have manifested\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w unto the men\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w thou gavest\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w the world\+w*: \+w thine\+w* \+w they were\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thou gavest\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w me\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w they have kept\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w word\+w*.
\+w Now\+w* \+w they have known\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w all things\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w thou hast given\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thee\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w I have given\+w* \+w unto them\+w* \+w the words\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w thou gavest\+w* \+w me\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w have received\+w* \+add them\+add*, \+w and\+w* \+w have known\+w* \+w surely\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I came out\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w they have believed\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w didst send\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w I\+w* \+w pray\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w them\+w*: \+w I pray\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w them which\+w* \+w thou hast given\+w* \+w me\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w they are\+w* \+w thine\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w mine\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w thine\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w are mine\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w I am glorified\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w them\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w now I am\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w thee\+w*. \+w Holy\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w keep\+w* \+w through\+w* \+w thine own\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w those whom\+w* \+w thou hast given\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w may be\+w* \+w one\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w we\+w* \+add are\+add*.

\+w While\+w* \+w I was\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w kept\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w name\+w*: \+w those that\+w* \+w thou gavest\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w I have kept\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w none\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w is lost\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w the son\+w* \+w of perdition\+w*; \+w that\+w* \+w the scripture\+w* \+w might be fulfilled\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w now\+w* \+w come I\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w thee\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w I speak\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they might have\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w joy\+w* \+w fulfilled\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w themselves\+w*.

\+w I\+w* \+w have given\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w word\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w hath hated\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w they are\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w even as\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the world\+w*.

\+w I pray\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou shouldest take\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou shouldest keep\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the evil\+w*.
\+w They are\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w even as\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the world\+w*.
\+w Sanctify\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w through\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w truth\+w*: \+w thy\+w* \+w word\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w truth\+w*.
\+w As\+w* \+w thou hast sent\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w even so have I also\+w* \+w sent\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the world\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w their sakes\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w sanctify\+w* \+w myself\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w might be\+w* \+w sanctified\+w* \+w through\+w* \+w the truth\+w*.

\+w Neither\+w* \+w pray I\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w alone\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w which shall believe\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w through\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w word\+w*;

\+w That\+w* \+w they all\+w* \+w may be\+w* \+w one\+w*; \+w as\+w* \+w thou\+w*, \+w Father\+w*, \+add art\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and I\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w may be\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w us\+w*: \+w that\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w may believe\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w hast sent\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w the glory\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w thou gavest\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w have given\+w* \+w them\+w*; \+w that\+w* \+w they may be\+w* \+w one\+w*, \+w even as\+w* \+w we\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w one\+w*:

\+w I\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they may be\+w* \+w made perfect\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w one\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w may know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w hast sent\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hast loved\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w thou hast loved\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w Father\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w they also\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w thou hast given\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w be\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w I am\+w*; \+w that\+w* \+w they may behold\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w glory\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w thou hast given\+w* \+w me\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w thou lovedst\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w the foundation\+w* \+w of the world\+w*.

\+w O righteous\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w the world\+w* \+w hath\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w known\+w* \+w thee\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w have known\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w have known\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w hast sent\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w I have declared\+w* \+w unto them\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will declare\+w* \+add it\+add*: \+w that\+w* \+w the love\+w* \+w wherewith\+w* \+w thou hast loved\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w may be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w and I\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w them\+w*.
